{{Quote|Most Imperial fighters carry onboard targeting support. In the old days, we acquired enemy targets using manual sights, but there aren't many of us left who can do that.|Captain Trox|<ref name="Stele Chronicles">{{StoryCite|story=The Stele Chronicles|book=Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)}}</ref>}}
'''Trox''' was a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He served as a [[TIE pilot]] instructor on the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Vengeance II|''Vengeance'']] where he trained [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].<ref name="Stele Chronicles" />
